name: Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil
description: This oil is obtained by pressing the seeds after harvesting sunflower. It is composed mainly of linoleic acid (fatty acid, omega 6) which allows a good hydration of the skin and vitamin E, an antioxidant. Sunflower oil is used in many treatments, it is often used as a base for floral oils. It is used as emollient (softens and softens the skin) or hair conditioner. It is also found in products to clean the skin, in babies in some liniments. It is allowed in organic.
common_product_types: Cold wax strips for bikini line & underarms (57.14%)

name: Hydrogen Peroxide
description: Hydrogen peroxide, more commonly known as hydrogen peroxide, is a colorless liquid mainly used in permanent hair coloring to depigment hair and in dental solutions to whiten teeth.In a study published by the IRC in September 2018, the agency concluded "that hydrogen peroxide is safe in cosmetic products under the current use and concentration practices described in this assessment. Security."In SCCNFP, for its part concluded in a 2002 opinion on the use of peroxide in bleaching products that "The overall evidence indicates that the appropriate use of teeth whitening agents containing from 0.1 to 6, 0% - hydrogen peroxide (or its equivalent for substances releasing hydrogen peroxide) is safe if used under the supervision of a dentist. "Throughout all studies, it can be seen that the use of hydrogen peroxide is not harmless and harmless. We are not immune to raw material suppliers who supply raw materials containing them and who do not respect the regulations.

name: Hydrogenated Castor Oil
description: Castor oil is obtained from castor seeds. It is here hydrogenated to change its consistency at room temperature and make it solid: this makes it a waxy material. It is then used in many cosmetics as emollient, film-forming agent or over-greasing. It is allowed in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Hydrogenated Castor Oil/Sebacic Acid Copolymer
description: This polymer is obtained from hydrogenated castor oil and Sebacic acid (sebacic acid) by oxidation of castor oil. It is easily biodegradable.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Hydrogenated Starch Hydrolysate
description: Used since the 1960s, hydrogenated starch hydrolysates (HSH) are a family of sweeter sweeteners than sugar, widely used in food in confectionery for example. They are produced by the partial hydrolysis of corn starch, wheat or potato. In practice, this rather generic name is used to designate any extended group of polyols (sugar alcohols).They are used in cosmetics as humectant: that is to say they retain water in the products and allow the pasta not to crystallize over time.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Hydrolyzed Corn Starch
description: Corn starch hydrolysis involves transforming corn starch by adding water, which changes its initial properties (absorbent, etc.). Hydrolyzed corn starch is used for its moisturizing properties.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Hydrolyzed Keratin
description: Keratin is a fibrous protein found in hair, feathers, wool and nails. This protein used in cosmetics is of animal origin and comes mostly from sheep wool (New Zealand is one of the largest producers). The plant version of keratin is called Phytokeratin and is better known in the INCI list under the term: "HYDROLYZED WHEAT PROTEIN".In cosmetics, keratin is used to smooth and moisturize the cuticle of damaged hair. It fills cracks and eliminates frizz related to drying.
common_product_types: Care for dry and damaged hair (23.48%)
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Animal.

name: Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose
description: Hydroxypropyl methylcellulose (hypromellose, HPMC) is a synthetic polymer used as a thickener, emulsifier or foaming agent. It dissolves in water to thicken and form a gel. It is used as a food additive under the name E464. It is produced using cellulose and propylene oxide. For these reasons, the ingredient is accompanied by an orange flower on our application.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Vegetal.
